setLevelController(ObjectController) - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
Installs a level javashooter.controller, i.e., a normal ObjectController instance attached to a dummy object that is invisible and has not javashooter.collider.

setSize(int, int) - Method in class javashooter.ui.GameUI
Sets size of both main game JFrame, as well as the game canvas, and adds 50 pixs to the height to make room for the main game buttons on the bottom.
